was really interesting, but it was for this very big project to replace fan blades at an air tunnel in NASA.

How we did it was a lot of RACI charts and a lot of tracking.
So we didn't have a specific software to implement that, but I would use, like, Excel sheets with dropdowns, triggers, rolls, things of that nature.
The RACI helped a lot in terms of.
Making sure certain people in those different groups were held accountable.

then internally, it was just having a hand on every single part of the process of developing features, fireside chats internally to talk about features before we fully release them or right after we release them.
